stemHtml: Can TREND and TAF reports be found in scheduled HF and continuous VHF VOLMETs?

options.a: These reports are prohibited in both HF and VHF VOLMETs.
options.b: TAFs are contained in both whenever it is possible.
options.c: TAFs are scheduled VOLMETs only if available.
options.d: TRENDs are in both VOLMETs if available.
